revision.text:
[[de:Amun-Re-Fest]] '''Amun-Re Festival''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME2-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME2 = W3-F35-N35-D1:N11:Z1 N12:N37:N35B C12-C1
Heb-nefer-en-tepi-schemu-Amun-Re
''ḥb-nfr-n-tpj-šmw-Jmn-Rˁ''
''Beautiful Feast of the First Shemu (at the New Moon festival) of Amun-Re'' }} The '''Amun-Re Festival''' was celebrated in honor of the deity {{ill|Amun-Re|1=Amun-Ra|2=de|3=Amun-Re|4=fr|5=Amon-Rê|de|Amun-Re|1=Amun-Ra|2=de|3=Amun-Re|4=fr|5=Amon-Rê|ja|アメン・ラー|zh|阿蒙-拉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and is attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}}, lasting five days. It was one of the main annual festivals held at the {{ill|Precinct of Amun-Re|en|Precinct of Amun-Re|qid=Q1306397|lt=Precinct of Amun-Re|1=Precinct of Amun-Re}} in {{ill|Karnak (disambiguation)|en|Karnak (disambiguation)|qid=Q403182|lt=Karnak|1=Karnak (disambiguation)}}, where the kings traveled to celebrate alongside the Egyptians. == Background == [[File:KarnakTempel.JPG|thumb|Amun-Re temple at Karnak]] The god Amun-Re was regarded as the "breath of life for all things," from the gentle breeze to the storm, as the mover of everything, giving life to chicks in eggs, fish in water, predators, humans, and stars. Common people worshipped him mainly in his direct and unchanged ram-form as a fertility god. Against this [[:en:Mythological|mythological]] background, it was important to offer Amun suitable sacrifices for the upcoming harvest. == Festival dates == The Amun-Re Festival was a moveable feast, tied to the {{ill|Egyptian lunar calendar|de|Ägyptischer Mondkalender|ja|エジプト太陰暦|zh|埃及陰曆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Egyptian lunar calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q1944246|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar}}. The festival always started on the first {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|qid=Q108566|lt=new moon|1=New moon}} of the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|qid=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} season and lasted until the fourth day after the new moon. From the {{ill|Third Intermediate Period of Egypt|en|Third Intermediate Period of Egypt|qid=Q212728|lt=Third Intermediate Period|1=Third Intermediate Period of Egypt}}, the following festival dates are securely attested: {| class="wikitable zebra" style="clear: both; background:#FFFAF0;" |- ! colspan="4" style="background:#FFE39B;"| Amun-Re Festival Dates |- ! style="background:#FFE39B;"| Name ! style="background:#FFE39B;"| Egyptian Date ! style="background:#FFE39B;"| {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} ! style="background:#FFE39B;"| Regnal Year |- | {{ill|Takelot II|en|Takelot II|qid=Q560026|lt=Takelot II|1=Takelot II}} ||style="text-align:center;"| {{ill|Shemu#Dates|de|Schemu#Datierungen|ja|シェム#日付|zh|舍穆#日期|lt=11th Shemu I|lt_de=11. Schemu I|lt_ja=シェムI月11日|lt_zh=舍穆一月11日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shemu#Dates|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ||style="text-align:center;"| {{ill|Takelot II#Amun-Re Festival Dates|de|Takelot II.#Daten Amun-Re-Fest|ja|タケロト2世#アメンラー祭|zh|塔克羅特二世#阿蒙-拉節日日期|lt=846 or 832 BCE|lt_de=846 oder 832 v. Chr.|lt_ja=紀元前846年または832年|lt_zh=公元前846年或832年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takelot II#Amun-Re Festival Dates|1=Takelot II|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q560026}} || 11th year |- | {{ill|Pedubast I|en|Pedubast I|qid=Q548570|lt=Pedubast I|1=Pedubast I}} ||style="text-align:center;"| [26th] Shemu I ||style="text-align:center;"| 2 December 828 BCE || 7th year = 14th year {{ill|Shoshenq III|en|Shoshenq III|qid=Q878396|lt=Shoshenq III|1=Shoshenq III}} |- | Pedubast I ||style="text-align:center;"| 16th Shemu I ||style="text-align:center;"| 22 November 827 BCE || 8th year = 15th year Shoshenq III |- | Shoshenq III ||style="text-align:center;"| 26th Shemu I ||style="text-align:center;"| 26 November 803 BCE || 39th year = {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)#Later lunar calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der spätere Mondkalender|ja|エジプト太陰暦#後期太陰暦|zh|埃及陰曆#後期陰曆|lt=Lunar dates|lt_de=Monddaten|lt_ja=太陰暦日付|lt_zh=陰曆日期|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)#Later lunar calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year Pedubast I |- | {{ill|Shabaka|en|Shabaka|qid=Q365929|lt=Shebitku|1=Shabaka}} ||style="text-align:center;"| 5th Shemu I ||style="text-align:center;"| 7–8 October 701 BCE || 3rd year |- | {{ill|Psamtik I#Death of Psamtik I|de|Psammetich I.#Tod von Psammetich I.|ja|プサムテク1世#死去|zh|普薩美提克一世#逝世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Psamtik I#Death of Psamtik I|1=Psamtik I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q328763}} ||style="text-align:center;"| 12th Shemu I ||style="text-align:center;"| 23–24 September 610 BCE || Last regnal year |} == See also == * {{ill|Opet Festival|en|Opet Festival|qid=Q1194158|lt=Opet Festival|1=Opet Festival}} == Literature == * {{ill|Hans Bonnet (Egyptologist)|de|Hans Bonnet (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハンス・ボネット (エジプト学者)|zh|漢斯·邦內|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hans Bonnet (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Lexikon der ägyptischen Religionsgeschichte.'' Nikol, Hamburg 2005, ISBN 3-937872-08-6. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|羅爾夫·克勞斯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, ISBN 3-8067-8086-X. * {{ill|Jean Meeus|en|Jean Meeus|qid=Q1281654|lt=Jean Meeus|1=Jean Meeus}}, Denis Savoie: "The history of the tropical year." In: ''The journal of the British Astronomical Association.'' Vol. 102, No. 1, 1992 ({{bibcode|1992JBAA..102...40M|qq=}}). * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|qid=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker|1=Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464|1=Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Mainz/Wiesbaden 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Amun-Re-Fest|version=243139256|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:アメン・ラー祭]] [[de:Amun-Re-Fest]] {{wikidata link|Q481558}}
